name: Colored Glass Tortoise Soap Pump - Threshold™
description:
Update your bathroom decor with the elegant style of the Colored Glass Tortoise Soap Pump from Threshold™. This brown soap pump features allover tortoiseshell print and is designed with a bronze-tone metal pump for an eye-catching look you'll love adding to your bath space. Made of colored glass, it's compatible with lotion soaps and holds up to 11.8 fluid ounces.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
